zh.lifeSummary: 當Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell於大約1158年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾時，他的父親Osmund Mordaunt , of Radwell29歲，母親Ellen Fortis30歲。他於1189年與Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey在英國英格蘭貝德福爾圖維結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1231年享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell于大约1158年出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾时，他的父亲Osmund Mordaunt , of Radwell29岁，母亲Ellen Fortis30岁。他于1189年与Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey在英国英格兰貝德福爾圖維结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1231年享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Thanh, Hung, Minh, Dung, Tuan, Hai, Hoa, Thuy, Son, Anh, Long, Hoang.  Chinese Hong, Sang, Chi, Dong, Tong, Lai, Hang, Man, Han, Ho, Phoung, Chan.  Korean Tam, Phong, Nam, Thai, Tuong, Chung, Thach, Tinh, Manh, Tham, Uyen, Vang.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 樂, meaning ‘happiness’ in Chinese: from the first element of the personal name Le Fu (樂父), style name of Yan, son of the Duke Dai of Song (ruler of the state of Song, reigned 799–766  BC ). Yan's grandson Le Ju (樂莒) inherited Le (樂) as his surname.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 勒: (i) from the second element of the placename Shu-Le (疏勒), an ancient state (located in present-day Xinjiang Uyghur autonomous region) during the Western Han dynasty (206  BC –25  AD ). (ii) a surname near the Bohai Sea region during the Han dynasty (206  BC –220  AD ). (iii) a surname traced back to the Hun ethnic group in northern China during the Jin dynasty (265–420  AD ).

variants.name: Yue
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Chi, Feng, Gang, Wei, Chun, Guo, Jin, Kin, Ping, Yan, Yun, Zhang, Chau, Du, Hau, Hung, My, Sau.

Mandarin form of the surname 岳 (or 嶽), meaning ‘high mountain’ in Chinese: traced back to Si Yue (四岳 or 四嶽), said to be the title of an official post in charge of sacrificial rituals on the site of famous mountains during the reign of the legendary Emperor Yao (c. 24th century BC ) and Emperor Shun (c. 23rd century BC ).

variants.name: Lok
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ping, Tat, Wing, Ying Lin, Chi Ming, Ching Wah, Chun, Chung Man, Han, Kam, Kam Tim, Kin.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 樂, see   Le   1.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 陸, 鹿, 逯 and 禄, see   Lu   5 and (7-9).

variants.name: Li
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ming, Li, Jian, Hong, Yan, Ping, Jing, Yong, Ying, Hui, Jin, Min, Chung.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 李, meaning ‘plum’: (i) said to have been adopted in place of the Chinese surname 理 (also pronounced Li; meaning ‘rules’ in Chinese) by Li Zhen (利貞), son of an official called Li Zheng (理徵) in the late Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). It is said that Li Zhen's father incurred the displeasure of King Zhou of Shang (died 1046  BC ) and Li Zhen fled to a wasteland area, where he survived on wild plums. After his return to civilization, he changed his surname to Li (李 ‘plum’), a word with the same pronunciation. The original surname, 理, is said to be from Li Guan (理官), the name of a post of officials in charge of legislation in ancient China. Li Er (李耳), also known as Lao Tzu or Lao Zi, traditionally regarded as the founder of Taoism, is believed to have been a descendant of Li Zhen. (ii) adopted as a surname by the Chi Li (叱李) family from the Xianbei ethnic group during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) in the early years of the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ), sixteen high officials with different surnames were granted the surname Li (李), the surname of the royal family of the Tang dynasty, by Emperor Taizong of Tang (died 649  BC ), because of their contributions to the establishment of the Tang regime. (iv) the surname can also be traced back to several minority ethnic groups in ancient China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 黎, meaning ‘black’ or ‘multitude’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Li (黎), the name of an ancient state (located in Changzhi in Shanxi province) during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ), which was annexed in the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ) and later granted to Fengshu, also known as Li Hou (黎侯, 'Marquis Li'). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Su Li (素黎) family, members of the Xianbei ethnic group, during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Mordaunt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French mordant ‘biting, sarcastic’.

nameMeanings.name: Eustace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old French form of the Late Greek names Eustakhios and Eustathios. These were evidently of separate origin, the former derived from eu ‘well, good’ + stakhys ‘grapes’, the latter from eu + stēnai ‘to stand’. However, the tradition is very confused. The name was introduced in this form to Britain by the Normans, among whom it was popular as a result of the fame of St Eustace , a Norman nobleman who was said to have been converted to Christianity by the vision of a crucifix between the antlers of the stag he was hunting.

en.lifeSummary: When Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell was born about 1158, in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Osmund Mordaunt , of Radwell, was 29 and his mother, Ellen Fortis, was 30. He married Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey in 1189, in Turvey, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1231, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell est né environ 1158, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Osmund Mordaunt , of Radwell, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Ellen Fortis, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey en 1189, à Turvey, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1231, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell um 1158 in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Osmund Mordaunt , of Radwell 29 und seine Mutter Ellen Fortis 30. Er hat 1189 in Turvey, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1231 im Alter von 75 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell è nato il circa 1158 nel Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Osmund Mordaunt , of Radwell, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Ellen Fortis, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey nel 1189, nel Turvey, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1231, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwellが約1158年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Osmund Mordaunt , of Radwellは29歳，母Ellen Fortisは30歳であった。1189年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアトゥルビーでAlice Alento , heiress of Turveyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1231年に75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell(이)가 대략 1158년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Osmund Mordaunt , of Radwell(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Fortis(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1189년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 터르비에서 Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1231년 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell nasceu aproximadamente 1158, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Osmund Mordaunt , of Radwell, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Fortis, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey em 1189, em Turvey, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1231, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell родился около 1158 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Osmund Mordaunt , of Radwell было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Fortis, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey в 1189 г. в местности турви, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1231 г. в возрасте 75 лет.

Se casó con Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey en 1189, en Turvey, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1231, a la edad de 75 años.
